headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Extra Space Storage, Raises Price Target to $144
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Michael Mueller   maintains Extra Space Storage (NYSE:EXR) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $142 to $144.
